title: webhook — model relationships
description: WebhookSubscription hasMany WebhookDelivery. Subscription optionally FKs to ApiVersion.slug for payload version pinning.

internal.description: Cascade on hard-delete of subscription. Soft-deleted subscription retains its deliveries.

outbound.description: Null = subscription applies platform-wide (rare; typically workspace-app scoped).
Null = follow publisher's current version. Set = payload transformer chain applied at dispatch.
Admin who created + owns the subscription. Notification target for WebhookSubscriptionDisabledNotification.
Denormalised from parent subscription for query filter efficiency.

inbound.description: Downstream modules relate INTO webhook via the WebhookRegistry binding (event registration) or via listening to InboundWebhookReceived / WebhookDelivered events. No downstream FK.
conventions: Channel modules (notifications-mail/-push/-sms) subscribe to InboundWebhookReceived events filtered by namespace to normalise provider callbacks.
Downstream modules that publish events register via #[AsWebhookEvent] attribute; no FK relationship, just registry membership.
